scripts.lint: pnpm run frontend:lint && pnpm run backend:lint
scripts.format: pnpm run frontend:format && pnpm run backend:format
scripts.format:check: pnpm run frontend:format:check && pnpm run backend:format:check
scripts.check: pnpm run frontend:check && pnpm run backend:check
scripts.backend:dev: BACKEND_PORT=$(node scripts/setup-dev-environment.js backend) pnpm run backend:dev:watch
scripts.backend:dev:watch: DISABLE_WORKTREE_CLEANUP=1 RUST_LOG=debug cargo watch -w crates -x 'run --bin server'
scripts.dev:qa: export FRONTEND_PORT=$(node scripts/setup-dev-environment.js frontend) && export BACKEND_PORT=$(node scripts/setup-dev-environment.js backend) && export VK_ALLOWED_ORIGINS="http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT}" && concurrently "pnpm run backend:dev:watch:qa" "pnpm run frontend:dev"
scripts.desktop:dev: pnpm -C frontend build && node scripts/desktop/prepare-sidecar.js --debug --skip-cli && pnpm tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json
